error404.title: Stop signal! Page not found
error404.description: We are sorry, but this track leads to nowhere. The page you are looking for might have been moved, deleted, or no longer exists.

meta.title: Track Dice - Your random adventure on the rails
meta.description: Experience an exciting random adventure with Track Dice!

show-logged-out.title:
Your Random
Train Adventure
show-logged-out.description: Ready for a new adventure on the rails? With Track Dice, the dice alone choose the route of your train. Grab the dice and start right away: Begin your random train adventure!
